text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A philosopher in the Middle Ages<n>once said:

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do not be led astray by the voices of<n>those
around you. Do not identify<n>yourself with idols as
you advance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do not identify with idols...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... I wanted to talk with you<n>about the
autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the number of slots, it<n>seems like the
girl who won the NHK<n>Mile Cup won't be able to
run...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Don't let it faze you. It<n>matters little
who runs or who<n>doesn't.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I will be the lead at the autumnTenno Sho! I will be the antagonistand the director! And you will also bepresent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Which is to say... she always has<n>next year.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall not be disturbed by any turn of<n>events. I
shall simply continue down<n>the path of the
Overlord! For this is<n>the Twinkle Series, and it
affords no<n>other means by which I may claim my
throne!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
News of the racer in question makes<n>its way to
Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So... this is how it is. After she worked<n>so hard in
the Kobe Shimbun Hai too...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She couldn't make it... even though<n>she tried her
hardest...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This sucks... This is the worst I've<n>felt since I
debuted...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never had to deal with anything like<n>this before I
began running myself... I<n>could just innocently
simp...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I lived as if I was in a dream watching
Umamusume happily run through<n>paradise...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never knew that the tears of those<n>angels
amassed beneath the sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And now it's come to this... I can't<n>have my
chance to shine without<n>stealing someone else's.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The dead end of a dead end! How am<n>I expected
to go into the autumn<n>Tenno Sho feeling like this?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I should have just never debuted at<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I'd just kept waffling between turf<n>and dirt
forever, this never would've<n>happened! Never...
choice_data_list:
None of the good things would have happened
either, though. Right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Do you really think you were better off ignorant?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I... No... I wasn't... Of course I wasn't.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I discovered the extraordinary thing<n>Umamusume
clasp onto at the end of<n>their struggles.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Winning and losing... That's what<n>racing is all
about. And if there are<n>winners, there have to be
losers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Someone always walks away sad no<n>matter what.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But that regret turns into motivation<n>for tomorrow! I
didn't know it before,<n>but now I've experienced it
firsthand!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can say from the bottom<n>of my heart
that all the Umamusume<n>in the Twinkle Series are
amazing! I<n>love them all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: They stay persistent, beaming asthey burst through every obstacle nomatter what!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's why I will do it too one day!AND SHE WILL TOO!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After her outburst, Agnes Digital<n>suddenly comes
to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She'll definitely... do it too... What<n>happened this
time isn't about<n>winning or losing, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's more like... overcoming hardship?<n>If that
determination is what makes<n>Umamusume so
precious...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Then she'll probably overcome this<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Maybe one day she'll realize that this<n>is just
another test that will make her<n>stronger.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You... really think so? I feel like... if<n>she can do it,
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then so can I. I'm Agnes Digital the<n>All-Rounder,
and I'm gonna run in<n>every race I possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the determination King taught<n>me and use
it to pass forth the torch<n>of courage, just like I
swore I would!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I have to give that Uma inspiration.<n>That's why...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll race in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not just gonna run! That's<n>definitely not
enough!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win so spectacularly that<n>she won't
have a single regret about<n>missing it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want it to be so great that it makes<n>her want to
run there next year. Like<n>sooo well that it'll drive
her to work<n>even harder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely do it! Definitely,definitely, definitely!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's my responsibility if I'm going<n>to run!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital sets her resolve for the<n>coming race.
However, T.M. Opera O<n>and Meisho Doto won't
be easy<n>opponents.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Long, long ago, a wise philosopher<n>once said...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't be led astray by the crowd.And especially don't spend so longin it that you can't move past it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but identify with them! I<n>feel their
emotions as if they were my<n>own and weep!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's what I do! That's how deep<n>my love for
Umamusume runs!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't go forward pretending like<n>there aren't
any Umas feeling<n>disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I'll take their sadness as my<n>own and
carry it into all the races I<n>run. Their tears will be
my power.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And even if it's not enough, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the feelings of every<n>Umamusume that
I've come across<n>and throw it all at the Overlord
and<n>Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her love for Umamusume is her<n>strength. The grief
she carried just<n>moments ago has become her
secret<n>weapon.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We need to use this drive to keep<n>chasing the two
peaks looming ahead<n>of us until the day of the
race.
